templates.name: BattleTanks Base Template
templates.description: Tank-combat starter template with protected engine core and customizable gameplay surface.
templates.recommendedPrompt: Create a new tank battle game using template 'battletanks-v1'. Keep core architecture stable and customize gameplay rules and UI.

templates.name: Blank Web App
templates.description: Lightweight baseline for non-game app generation with VIVERSE integration hooks.
templates.recommendedPrompt: Create a new web app from template 'blank-webapp-v1' and implement the requested feature set.
